title: panax notoginseng
intro: Panax notoginseng, also known as Sanqi or Tianqi, is a type of plant native to the mountainous regions of China and other parts of Asia, belonging to the Araliaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-oxidative, and anti-coagulant effects. The health benefits of Panax notoginseng include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced cognitive function, and reduced risk of stroke and other cardiovascular diseases. Panax notoginseng is commonly prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tablet, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
